Operation 'tasks.tasks.move' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details. Missing summary entirely. Description is comprehensive but could be clearer about expected inputs (destination list, position parameters) and outputs (returns updated task). Improved summary provides action-oriented clarity. Enhanced description clarifies inputs and explicitly states return value for AI agent understanding.

data.current_description: Moves the specified task to another position in the destination task list. If the destination list is not specified, the task is moved within its current list. This can include putting it as a child task under a new parent and/or move it to a different position among its sibling tasks. A user can have up to 2,000 subtasks per task.
data.summary_suggestion: Move task to new position or list
data.description_suggestion: Moves the specified task to another position in the destination task list, or within its current list if no destination is specified. Supports repositioning among sibling tasks and assigning parent-child relationships. Returns the updated task object. Note: A user can have up to 2,000 subtasks per task.
data.reasoning: Missing summary entirely. Description is comprehensive but could be clearer about expected inputs (destination list, position parameters) and outputs (returns updated task). Improved summary provides action-oriented clarity. Enhanced description clarifies inputs and explicitly states return value for AI agent understanding.

data.current_description: Deletes the authenticated user's specified task list. If the list contains assigned tasks, both the assigned tasks and the original tasks in the assignment surface (Docs, Chat Spaces) are deleted.

Returns HTTP 204 No Content on success.
